ddls:
CREATE TABLE "containers" (
  "container_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each container type */,
  "container_name" TEXT /* Name of the container type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the container type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the container type was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the container type was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the container type is active */,
  "complexity_class" TEXT /* General complexity class for the container type */,
  "documentation_link" TEXT /* Link to detailed documentation for the container type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("container_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "container_id" INTEGER /* ID of the container type the requirement belongs to */,
  "expression" TEXT /* Expression type (e.g., X::value_type, X::reference) */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Result type (e.g., T, lvalue of T) */,
  "operational_semantics" TEXT /* Operational semantics (e.g., None, Any iterator category except output iterator) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes and comments for the requirement */,
  "complexity" TEXT /* Complexity level (e.g., compile time, runtime) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the requirement was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the requirement was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the requirement is active */,
  "example_code" TEXT /* Example code snippet demonstrating the requirement */,
  "test_cases" TEXT /* Test cases related to the requirement */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the requirement (e.g., draft, reviewed, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requirements_container_id FOREIGN KEY ("container_id") REFERENCES containers ("container_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the requirement the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., 1.0, 2.0) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, reviewed, approved) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the version is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_requirement_id FOREIGN KEY ("requirement_id") REFERENCES requirements ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the requirement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the requirement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the requirement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the requirement */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the requirement */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_requirement_id FOREIGN KEY ("requirement_id") REFERENCES requirements ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the team is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the requirement the comment is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the comment is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_requirement_id FOREIGN KEY ("requirement_id") REFERENCES requirements ("requirement_id")
)
